channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Southern California officials trying to prevent explosion or leak from damaged chemical tank
item.description: Authorities are trying to tamp down the risk of a possible explosion or leak of a damaged chemical tank at a facility in Southern California.

item.title: Dangers from damaged California chemical tank persist. Here’s what to know
The origins of Memorial Day and how it has evolved
